description: Task instructions text updates dynamically on the screen, guiding the user through the session requirements.
frame_description: A dark overlay displaying sequential text instructions and a 'Repeat the task instructions' button.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Repeat the task instructions' button.
User navigates from the task instructions overlay to the Google homepage.
User types 'sky' into the Google search bar, triggering search suggestions.
User navigates to the Google search results page for 'skyscanner'.
